title: Onyx Museum
summary: Museum after-hours: black walls, a single warm picture light. Each tool is a room. Iframe is the only object the gallery lamp is pointed at.
darkAccent: bone-cream #D9CFAA — active wall-label numeral, picture light on the iframe, saving pill text only
typeface: Spectral 500 (display, rail numerals, pane titles) + Plus Jakarta Sans 400/500 (body, forms, log lines)
railTreatment: wall-label Roman numerals I, II, III, IV, V in Spectral 22px ink-secondary; active goes bone-cream and the 2px bone bar appears at the left edge
